arts.ttl: Real Madrid cancel press conference before Copa del Rey final in protest
arts.sum: Real Madrid have continued their war on the refereeing body (CTA) and Royal Spanish Football Federation over officials, and have cancelled their press conference and training session ahead of the Copa del Rey final. Madrid requested a change of officials, feeling that de Burgos Bengoetxea and Gonzalez Fuertes were not in the correct state for the final. RFEF have rejected this request.

arts.ttl: 2 Barcelona, 2 Real Madrid: La Liga’s statistical Team of the Week

arts.ttl: Copa del Rey final referee breaks down in tears ahead of Barcelona vs Real Madrid: ‘This isn’t fair’
arts.sum: Ricardo de Burgos Bengoetxea, the referee assigned to this weekend’s Copa del Rey final, could not help but allow his emotions to show during an appearance in front of the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Real Madrid: Los Blancos receive triple injury boost for El Clasico
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti names Kylian Mbappe, David Alaba and Ferland Mendy in his squad for Saturday's Copa del Rey final against Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Official: 2 major absences as Barcelona name squad to face Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Former Real Madrid star reveals Barcelona snub this season
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid goalkeeper Keylor Navas has revealed that he turned down a shock offer to join Barcelona at the start of the current campaign.

arts.ttl: Clásico combined XI: Which Barcelona, Real Madrid stars make the cut?
arts.sum: Viní Jr. or Raphinha? Lewandowski or Mbappé? Or play all of them together? Our Barcelona and Real Madrid correspondents choose their combined XIs.

arts.ttl: Barcelona and Real Madrid meet in Copa del Rey final with more than a trophy on the line
arts.sum: Barcelona and Real Madrid meet in the Copa del Rey final on Saturday with more than just the trophy on the line for the fierce Spanish rivals. Barcelona dominated their other two meetings this season, beating Madrid 5-2 in the Spanish Super Cup final in January after winning 4-0 at Madrid in the league in October.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid TV Release Video of Referee Ahead of Copa del Rey Final - Here's Why
arts.sum: An explanation on why Real Madrid TV have released a video of the referee ahead of their 2025 Copa del Rey final vs Barcelona.
